query:
SELECT 
  status, 
  COUNT(*) as count,
  AVG(duration) as avg_duration,
  MIN(startedAt) as first_call,
  MAX(startedAt) as last_call
FROM call_logs 
WHERE startedAt > UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CURDATE()) * 1000
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY count DESC;
